name: io.github.boyce-io/boyce
title: Boyce
description: Deterministic SQL compiler for AI agents. Your agent stops guessing SQL.

environmentVariables.name: BOYCE_DB_URL
environmentVariables.description: PostgreSQL or Redshift connection string. Optional — tools work without live DB; required for live profiling and EXPLAIN pre-flight.

environmentVariables.name: BOYCE_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: LLM provider for the NL→StructuredFilter planner (anthropic, openai). MCP hosts using their own model should not set this — the host's model does the reasoning and Boyce receives a pre-built StructuredFilter.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Required only when BOYCE_PROVIDER=anthropic and the host does not supply its own model. MCP hosts (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Cline, Windsurf, JetBrains) do not need this.

com.convergentmethods.tagline: Deterministic SQL compiler for AI agents. Your agent stops guessing SQL.
